fix(client): fix audio interruptions on MAX98357A playback

- Remove delay(5) from loop and call mp3_loop() 8x per iteration
  (mirrors server) to prevent I2S DMA buffer starvation
- Add 20-iteration idle debounce before muting volume in mp3_loop()
  to avoid glitches from brief isRunning()=false between DMA chunks

- Store only taskId in modal state and derive task object from localTasks

commit.message:
fix: connexion Google — popup partout, redirect seulement si popup bloquée

Le signInWithRedirect causait une erreur "missing initial state" sur mobile
car Firebase perd le sessionStorage en traversant deux domaines différents
(Vercel → firebaseapp.com → Vercel).

Nouvelle logique :
- Tente signInWithPopup sur tous les appareils (mobile inclus)
- Si popup bloquée (auth/popup-blocked), fallback vers signInWithRedirect
- Message d'erreur explicite si les deux échouent

commit.message:
fix: raise SR advance threshold from 55% to 75%

55% was too low — for a 9-word line like "I've been thinking about us.
About where we're going.", saying just the first 5 words (55.6%) triggered
the advance. At 75%, user must say ~7/9 words before instant advance.
Whisper fallback (40%) still handles partial lines after silence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

research: constructive 2D Borsuk-Ulam via Tucker lemma (borsuk-ulam-oq-03-oq-03) (#3371)

Build bridge from Tucker's lemma to 2D Borsuk-Ulam theorem using
dominant component labeling. Define antisymmetric difference g(x) =
f(x) - f(-x), prove oddness and continuity, formalize triangulated
disk structure and grid triangulation. State approximate and exact
BU theorems. 7 proved, 5 sorries, 2 axioms.

commit.message:
B2 fix: hostility_index calibration dead zone resolved

Root cause: standard isotonic regression on 882 val points created a flat
step in raw [5.854, 7.650] because bins 15-17 had mildly non-monotonic true
means (6.69→6.64→6.31), causing PAVA to pool the entire range into 6.6896.
Data was present (271 points, 30.7%) — sparse data was not the cause.

Fix: quantile-binned isotonic regression (n_bins=20). Pre-aggregating into
equal-sample bins smooths noise before fitting; PAVA pools fewer adjacent
violators, producing a gradual slope instead of a flat step.

Results:
  Dead zone [5.854, 7.650]: calibrated [6.6896, 6.6896] std=0
                          → calibrated [6.0045, 7.2539] std=0.3783
  HI MAE: 1.6631 → 1.5980 (-3.9%, no regression)
  Calibration version: isotonic-v1 → isotonic-v2

Files:

commit.message:
fix(ai-client): re-evaluate continuation after chained tool approvals (#347)

* fix(ai-client): re-evaluate continuation after chained tool approvals

When a second tool approval arrives while a continuation stream is
already in progress, the checkForContinuation call is skipped due to
the continuationPending guard. This adds a continuationSkipped flag so
that, once the active stream finishes, the client re-checks whether
another continuation is needed, ensuring chained approval flows
complete correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: VirtualKeyboardView — SwiftUI QWERTY overlay with haptics (#2591)

Implements a SwiftUI-native virtual keyboard overlay for emulator
cores that support keyboard input (gameSupportsKeyboard == true).

New files:
- VirtualKeyboardLayouts.swift: Full US ANSI QWERTY layout data
  using GCKeyCode HID values (function row + 5 main rows)
- VirtualKeyboardViewModel.swift: Observable state manager for
  sticky modifiers, Caps Lock, keyDown/keyUp event forwarding via
  VirtualKeyboardDelegate protocol
- VirtualKeyboardView.swift: Semi-transparent bottom-sheet overlay
  with per-key haptics, swipe-down dismiss, and close button.
  Keys fire keyDown on touch-begin and keyUp on touch-end using
  DragGesture(minimumDistance:0) for simultaneous multi-touch.
- PVEmulatorViewController+VirtualKeyboard.swift: Adds the overlay
  as a child VC (not a modal) so emulation stays unpaused.
  Forwards GCKeyCode events to the core via KeyboardResponder.

Modified:
- RetroMenuView.swift: Shows "VIRTUAL KEYBOARD" toggle in CORE tab
  when coreSupportsVirtualKeyboard == true. hasCoreFeatures also
  accounts for keyboard-capable cores.

Part of #2575
Closes #2580

commit.message:
Fix Phase 1 plan: cache truncation, EOS-based early stop, realistic estimates

- Cache reuse: use KVCache.trim() to truncate to prompt boundary,
  not skip-based (which corrupts positional state)
- Early stop: check EOS token probability, not max logprob
  (high P("the")=0.98 is not a stop signal)
- ViT still runs every request (Phase 2 target), adjust prefill
  savings estimate from 30-50% to 15-25%
- Add cross_attention_states handling for encoder-decoder models
- Add KVCache.trim() verification to risk analysis

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix duplicate inline images in chat when Pi creates a plot

Chokidar fires both add and change events for new files, which can
land in separate debounce windows. addPendingImages now deduplicates
against already-pending paths to prevent the same image appearing twice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix off-by-one in AEST day number calculation

Previous code zeroed LAUNCH_DATE hours which shifted it back a day,
causing day numbers to be 1 too high. Now uses days-since-epoch
arithmetic for both current AEST date and launch date, avoiding
any date manipulation bugs. March 4 AEST = day 1, March 7 = day 4.
